health-topic.title: Asthma
health-topic.meta-desc: Asthma is a chronic lung condition.

full-summary.p: Asthma affects the airways and can cause wheezing.
Patients may need inhaled medicines and follow-up.

ul.li: Urgent sign: severe shortness of breath

health-topic.title: Chronic Cough
health-topic.meta-desc: Cough lasting more than eight weeks needs evaluation.

full-summary.p: Chronic cough should be evaluated by a clinician.
